ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "published" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the article */,
  "feed_label" TEXT /* Label of the news feed where the article was published */,
  "bank_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the primary bank involved in the project (if applicable) */,
  "bank_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary bank involved in the project (if applicable) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the article */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article is related to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the article is related to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_bank_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id2") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_bank_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id1") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of the bank (e.g., Development Bank, Commercial Bank) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the bank */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the bank */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding allocated for the project */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary bank involved in the project */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the project is implemented */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the project belongs to */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the project is related to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_regions" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sectors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_topics" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, project manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article or project */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article or project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article version */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the article */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the article version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the article version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the project version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
